sideload.description: Sideloads a package to the device

install.description: Pushes a package to the device and installs it

devices.description: Prints a list of connected devices

logcat.description: Prints log data to the screen

flags.-c: Clear (flush) the entire log and exit
flags.-d: Dump the log and then exit
Direct to the only attached USB device
flags.-e: Direct to the only running emulator
flags.-s: Direct to the device with the given serial

flash.description: Write a file to a flash partition

checkout.description: Switch branches or restore working tree files

flags.-b: Create and checkout a new branch

flags.-m: Use the given message as the commit message
flags.-a: Stage all modified and deleted files
flags.--amend: Replace the tip of the current branch by creating a new commit

push.description: Update remote refs along with associated objects

pull.description: Fetch from and integrate with another repository or a local branch

flags.--rebase: Rebase local commits on top of fetched branch
flags.--no-commit: Perform the merge but do not commit

flags.--short: Give the output in the short-format

add.description: Add file contents to the index

Add all files in current directory
flags.-A: Add all files in the working tree

flags.-a: List both remote-tracking and local branches

flags.--online: Displays a list of available distributions for install
flags.--verbose: Shows detailed information about all distributions

--set-version.description: Change the version of the specified distribution

--update.description: Update the Windows Subsystem for Linux package

flags.--status: Show the status of Windows Subsystem for Linux

flags.-y: Automatically answer yes to all prompts

deploy.description: Deploy code and assets to your Firebase project

flags.--except: Deploy all features except specified, comma-separated features

init.description: Interactively configure the current directory as a Firebase workspace

serve.description: Start a local server for your static assets

flags.--port: The port on which to listen
flags.--host: The host on which to listen

flags.--reauth: Force reauthentication even if already logged in
flags.--no-localhost: Copy and paste a code instead of starting a local server for authentication

flags.-A: Print NUM lines of trailing context
flags.-B: Print NUM lines of leading context
flags.-C: Print NUM lines of output context
flags.--extended-regexp: Interpret pattern as an extended regular expression
flags.--fixed-strings: Interpret pattern as a list of fixed strings
flags.--basic-regexp: Interpret pattern as a basic regular expression
flags.--perl-regexp: Interpret pattern as a Perl regular expression
flags.--count: Print a count of matching lines for each input file
flags.--files-with-matches: Print only names of files with selected lines
flags.--files-without-match: Print only names of files with no selected lines
flags.--line-number: Prefix each line of output with the line number
flags.--only-matching: Show only the part of a line matching PATTERN
flags.--quiet: Quiet mode; do not write anything to standard output
flags.--recursive: Read all files under each directory recursively
flags.--dereference-recursive: Read all files under each directory recursively (follow symlinks)
flags.--no-messages: Suppress error messages about nonexistent or unreadable files
flags.--invert-match: Invert the sense of matching, to select non-matching lines
flags.--word-regexp: Select only those lines containing matches that form whole words
flags.--line-regexp: Select only those matches that exactly match the whole line
flags.--exclude: Skip files whose base name matches GLOB
flags.--exclude-dir: Exclude directories matching the pattern DIR from recursive searches
flags.--include: Search only files whose base name matches GLOB

flags.--pipe: Read input file from standard input (pipe)
flags.--export-filename: Output file name (can be absolute or relative path)
flags.--export-type: File type to export: [svg, png, ps, eps, pdf, emf, wmf, xaml]
flags.--export-width: Width of exported bitmap in pixels
flags.--export-height: Height of exported bitmap in pixels
flags.--export-area-drawing: Export area is the entire drawing
flags.--export-background: Background color for exported bitmap (e.g. #ffffff or 'white')
flags.--query-all: Query id, x, y, width and height of all objects
flags.--actions: List of actions to execute (semicolon separated)
